content.full_text:
Receipt of Free Ticket to Political Fundraiser -- Reporting Standards

X buys a ticket to Y's political fundraiser and gives it to Z.

Y must report receipt of a contribution from X.
Z must report the ticket as a contribution if he is a candidate or elected officeholder. If Z is a public official, other than an elected official, Z must report the ticket as a gift. The value of the contribution/gift to Z is the face value of the ticket.
